subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-11-03 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: The law of Peace has come to stay. We are living in the radiant age of Peace. The Angels of Peace are hovering above our heads.
subcodes.subjects: @universal peace; world unity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @unity of governments; political unity, @high station of the true believer, @call to action
